title: Forty Thieves
writer: Michael Wilson, Bernie Kamins, Clarence E. Mulford
actors: William Boyd, Andy Clyde, Jimmy Rogers
plot: When he runs for sheriff, Hoppy is beaten by Jerry Doyle, the gutless wonder voted for by every crook in town. When Hoppy moves to have the new sheriff impeached, outlaw leader Tad Hammond hires forty gunslingers to stop him. Stop...
